Row.Text: Pankuš
Towns have +1 Happiness per assigned resource, and Cities have +3 Happiness per assigned resource.
Towns have +1 Happiness per assigned resource
Cities have +3 Happiness per assigned resource
Ritual Pits
Clay Pits, Mines and Quarries give +2[icon:YIELD_CULTURE] Culture, but -1[icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production.
Clay Pits, Mines and Quarries +2[icon:YIELD_CULTURE] Culture
Clay Pits, Mines and Quarries -1[icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production.
Gifts of the Storm God
+2 Happiness per Unassigned Resouce.
+2 Happiness per Unassigned Resouce.
Oath of Loyalty
+1[icon:YIELD_HAPPINESS] Happiness per Unit packed in a commander
+1[icon:YIELD_HAPPINESS] Happiness per Unit packed in a commander
